## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Adapter or integration
- [ ] Eval rule or policy
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Release or CI maintenance

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run release:audit`
- [ ] Relevant demo command or example was run

## Trace Safety

- [ ] No private traces, prompts, credentials, customer data, or local secrets are committed.
- [ ] Any shared trace artifacts are minimal and redacted.

## Notes

Add screenshots, dashboard links, or follow-up work when useful.
